scripts.build: esbuild src/popup.ts src/background.ts --bundle --outdir=build --target=es2020 && copyfiles -u 1 src/manifest.json src/*.html src/styles/*.css src/*.png build/
scripts.publish: npm run build && mkdir -p release && (cd build && zip -r ../release/dedupe.zip *) && zip -r release/dedupe-source.zip README.md *.json src/*
